assets.placement: body background-image, behind all content, fixed attachment, cover size
assets.prompt: Extremely subtle warm paper grain texture on warm off-white base (#F2EDE8). Organic micro-grain noise, near-invisible variation in tone — slightly warmer toward left edge, cooler toward right. No discernible pattern, no lines, no geometric repetition. Just the softest analog warmth that prevents digital flatness. Like a premium uncoated stock paper under even studio lighting. Tileable seamlessly at 1920x1080. Art style: analog grain scan, photographic paper texture. Mood: calm, editorial, human, warm.
assets.negative_prompt: visible pattern, tiling seams, lines, gradients, color shifts, watermark, text, dark areas, stock photo look, noise grain that reads as salt-and-pepper, harsh contrast
assets.style_reference: Premium paper texture, editorial magazine stock

assets.placement: top-right corner of the DSA Tracker card, 80x80px display size, decorative only
assets.prompt: Minimal abstract geometric mark on transparent background. A single node-and-edge graph data structure element: one central filled circle (6px radius) connected by clean straight line edges to three smaller satellite circles (3-4px radius), arranged asymmetrically — two above at angles, one below centered. Pure flat color in burnt sienna (#C95F3A). No gradients. No shadows. No background fill. Stroke weight 2px on edges, solid fills on circles. Two dashed secondary edges extending to implied off-canvas nodes. Centered composition with generous padding on 120x120px canvas. Art style: flat SVG editorial illustration, design system icon quality. Mood: precise, technical, warm, minimal.
assets.negative_prompt: gradients, shadows, 3D rendering, photorealism, text, labels, color other than #C95F3A, multiple colors, complex illustration, decorative flourishes, rounded corners on edges, glow effects
assets.style_reference: Flat graph node illustration, design system documentation mark
